replies.text: Thank you for your patience. As a Senior Specialist, I've reviewed your full conversation. I can assure you this won't be dismissed. For your concern: "N/A", I'm escalating this to our customer resolutions director. You'll receive a direct call or email within 2 hours.

conversation_log.text: I hear you, and I want to assure you this is being treated as a high-priority case. I've documented everything you've shared. Would you prefer I connect you with a senior specialist who can take direct action?
